'''Toronaxx''' was the public face of [[Dugs-for-Democracy]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] issued public statements following the death of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]] and the appointment of his successor [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|regional/13411_1.html|Moe Funeral Disrupted by Dug Activists}} {{1st}}
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|53|news/13425_2.html|Senator Aak Officially Appointed}}
